name: SWIMMINGSITE
postCreateCommand: python -m pip install --upgrade pip && if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then python -m pip install -r requirements.txt; else python -m pip install streamlit pandas plotly openpyxl; fi

postAttachCommand.server: python -m streamlit run streamlit_app.py --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
